notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Gift flow and gift preservation remain from accepted CC7.5.12.
Buttons flow now sends the next menu as a fresh bottom message after user text/link input, instead of editing an older menu above the user input.
Buttons step 4 wording is clarified: current supported target is a link; internal MAX actions will be added later as a separate mode.
Older button menus are cleaned after user input; the user's own text/link message is not deleted.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: current runtime is stable but still layered through 7510-7513 wrappers; after acceptance, optimize by merging admin flows into one clean adminkit-admin-flows-core.js.
